caseId.title: Case ID
caseId.description: The internal Salesforce ID of the created case.

caseNumber.title: Case Number
caseNumber.description: The customer-facing ticket number such as 001234.

erroMsg.title: Erro
erroMsg.description: Details if the ticket creation failed.

mensagemChat.title: Resposta
mensagemChat.description: Confirmation message with the ticket number for the customer.

sucesso.title: Sucesso
sucesso.description: Indicates if the support ticket was successfully recorded.
